name: IRC_CAMP_AUDIENCE_SOURCE
description: Table to store the campaign and related audience source associations.

columns.Name: AUDIENCE_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key for this table. System generated.

columns.Name: REFRESH_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates whether the audience refresh is allowed or not. Default value is ‘N’

columns.Name: AUDIENCE_SOURCE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Stores the audience source type. It can be Hcm List, Eligibility profile etc.

columns.Name: AUDIENCE_SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of audience sources i.e. Hcm List Id, Eligibility Profile Id

columns.Name: AUDIENCE_CRITERIA
columns.Comments: Stores the campaign audience criteria in JSON.

columns.Name: AUDIENCE_EXTRACTION_DATE
columns.Comments: Stores the date and time on which the Audience was extracted from the source

columns.Name: AUDIENCE_COUNT
columns.Comments: Stores the audience count of the campaign

columns.Name: CUSTOM_TOKENS
columns.Comments: Stores the tokens that are extracted from the excel sheet after transforming and The mappings

columns.Name: AUDIENCE_EXTRACTION_STATUS
columns.Comments: Stores the audience extraction status.Valid values ORA_PENDING,ORA_IN_PROGRESS,ORA_COMPLETED,ORA_CANCELLED.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Stores whether record is active or not.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
